questions.q: Who was identified as the suspect in the April 2026 shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, having referred to himself as a 'Friendly Federal Assassin' in writings to his family?
On April 27, 2026, King Charles III and Queen Camilla arrived in the United States for a high-security state visit marking which milestone?
options: 100th anniversary of the US-UK special relationship
50th anniversary of his first US visit

questions.q: Ahead of a planned 2026 summit between Xi Jinping and Donald Trump, China expanded its economic pressure tools by enacting laws to punish foreign firms doing what?
options: Shifting supply chains away from China
Refusing to share AI source code
Exporting rare earth metals to the US
questions.correctText: Shifting supply chains away from China

questions.q: In an April 27, 2026 interview, which Russian Deputy Prime Minister stated it would take several months for the global oil market to recover even if the Strait of Hormuz blockade is lifted?
